examples: If I live, I may be a hunchback, but I shan't live.

For one thing, he's afraid he'll look at Colin some day and find he's growed hunchback.
"Everyone's heard of 'Hercules, ' 'Hunchback of Notre Dame, ' 'Pocahontas' and 'Beauty and the Beast, "' he said.
If it actually is the king, however, it will lay to rest some of the argument surrounding his hunchback.
